base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should increase call_wall_acceptance_long sample count from the current one-trade footprint while preserving valid-0DTE option confirmation. Expected upside is higher net profit and PnL per exposure hour from clean call-wall impulses; risk is wall-chase entries with higher MAE if the relaxed DEX and call-volume thresholds admit weak acceptance.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long as the next isolated experiment. Prior fallback/take-profit work is saturated and recently hurt score, while call_wall_acceptance_long is underexplored and showed the best realized efficiency: 1 trade, $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, and only -11.7 worst MAE. This is not a global filter and does not let option-confirmed profiles trade on missing or stale 0DTE data.
